hero.subtitle: Focus on the taste, we handle the rest. Quotes, calendar, inventory and customer relations in one app infused with the spirit of Teranga.
hero.free: Free up to 30 orders/month · No credit card required

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Every caterer we met had the same problems.

lostOrders.title: Orders get lost
lostOrders.body: One client writes on WhatsApp, another on Instagram, another by email. Result: you forget someone and lose an order.

doubleBooking.title: Double bookings
doubleBooking.body: You said yes to two weddings the same weekend. You didn't know your team was already at full capacity.

slowQuotes.title: Quotes take hours
slowQuotes.body: Word, Excel, calculator, WhatsApp... Writing a proper quote takes you an entire afternoon.

problem.solution: RestaurantsOS solves all three at once — and much more.

features.moreSubtitle: Everything a modern caterer needs, in one tool.

orders.title: An elegant quote in 2 clicks.
orders.body: Create a quote, add dishes from your menu, send it as PDF. Track deposits and confirmations in a clear Kanban board.

calendar.title: No more double bookings.
calendar.body: Visualize your schedule in real time. Each event type has a weight: 1 wedding counts as much as 5 cocktail parties. You always know if you can say yes.

inbox.title: All your clients in one place.
inbox.body: WhatsApp, Instagram, Email and Messenger in one inbox. Never miss an order because of a missed message again.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.desc: Create recipe cards in text, photo or voice. Export as elegant PDF, organize in folders.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.desc: Track your stock with threshold alerts. Link each ingredient to a supplier.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.desc: Centralize all your supplier contacts and their terms. Excel import available.

menu.title: Digital Menu
menu.desc: Publish your menu online with photos, prices and allergens. Shareable with your clients.

crm.title: Client CRM
crm.desc: Order history, notes, tags. Find any client in 2 seconds.

team.title: Team Management
team.desc: Invite collaborators with specific roles: admin, manager, agent.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 5 minutes.
howItWorks.subtitle: No training, no technician. You, your phone, let's go.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.desc: Business name, currency, color. Your workspace is ready.

step2.title: Configure your activity
step2.desc: Add your dishes, set your capacity, connect WhatsApp.

step3.title: Receive your orders
step3.desc: Your clients contact you, you reply and manage everything from the app.

import.title: Already have data? Import it.
import.body: Recipes, clients, suppliers, ingredients, products — all importable from Excel or CSV. Download the template, fill it in, import.

pricing.title: Fair pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade to premium when your business takes off.

free.name: Free
free.description: To test the platform and start slowly.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For established caterers who want to centralize everything.

conversations.name: Marème Ndiaye
conversations.msg: Hello, I'd like a quote for 150 people...

testimonials.title: What they say about us
testimonials.quote: Before, I spent my nights on WhatsApp managing orders. With RestaurantsOS, I found time to create new recipes — and my revenue grew by 30%.
testimonials.author: Aminata Diallo

cta.title: Your next order is already waiting.
cta.subtitle: Join caterers who chose peace of mind. Start for free today — no credit card.
cta.note: Free up to 30 orders · 5-minute setup · French & English support

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for caterers who want to blend tradition and technology. Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire and all of West Africa.
footer.copyright: Made with passion for West Africa
